title: angelica montana
intro: Angelica montana, also known as wild angelica or mountain angelica, is a perennial plant species that belongs to the carrot family (Apiaceae) and is native to the mountainous regions of Europe. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antispasmodic effects. The health benefits of Angelica montana include its ability to alleviate digestive issues, reduce fever, and provide relief from respiratory problems such as bronchitis and asthma. The plant can be prepared as a tea, infusion, or tincture, and is often used in combination with other herbs in herbal remedies to promote overall health and well-being.
